tsTroubleshooting.title: 21928 Calibration not accepted: Selected roll is not active

abstract.p: 21928 Calibration not accepted: Selected roll is not active.
Cause: A start condition for starting the calibration fails. The media roll for which the calibration was requested is not the active media roll. The calibration request is not accepted.

tsCauses.p: The requested media roll is not loaded

tsDiagnose.p: Load a media roll if there was no active roll. Select the active roll to perform the calibration on.
